creator: ats@first.gmd.de
text:
a make fetch and make checksum in ports/devel/ruby-optparse gives
a checksum. It looks like the tarfile has been repackaged after the
md5 distinfo was generated.

Fix: 

Generating a new md5 checksum and update distinfo.
How-To-Repeat: try a fetch from the mastersite and a make checksum
